title: rubus duplex
intro: Rubus duplex, also known as the double-flowered raspberry, is a perennial shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to parts of Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of phenolic acids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rubus duplex include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Rubus duplex can be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and creams, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
